criteria_results.criterion: WorktreeDetailRefactored.tsx の対象2コンテナ (L1740, L1763) の className に min-w-0 が含まれる
criteria_results.evidence: git diff shows `min-w-0` added to exactly two desktop containers: L1740 `flex flex-col flex-1 min-h-0 min-w-0` (PRIMARY, direct flex item of the L1738 flex-row) and L1763 `flex-1 min-h-0 min-w-0` (DEFENSIVE, wraps WorktreeDesktopLayout). New unit test 'desktop layout containers carry min-w-0 to prevent horizontal overflow (Issue #732)' traverses up from the mocked desktop-layout testid and asserts toHaveClass on both containers; it PASSED (33ms).

criteria_results.criterion: モバイル経路 (~L1590 の flex-1 min-h-0) は未変更 (静的確認)
criteria_results.evidence: Read of WorktreeDetailRefactored.tsx L1590 confirms FileTreeView className remains `flex-1 min-h-0` (no min-w-0). git diff for the file contains only the two desktop-container hunks (L1737-L1740 and L1760-L1763); the L1590 mobile line is NOT present in the diff.

criteria_results.criterion: ターミナル/履歴の既存挙動が壊れない (既存テスト非破壊)
criteria_results.evidence: npx vitest run tests/unit/components/WorktreeDetailRefactored.test.tsx -> Test Files 1 passed; Tests 42 passed | 1 skipped. No regressions in the affected file (the 1 skip is a pre-existing skip, not introduced by this change). TDD report records the full suite as 6700 passed | 7 skipped | 0 failed.

criteria_results.criterion: npm run lint / npx tsc --noEmit / npm run test:unit / npm run build 全PASS
criteria_results.evidence: lint: `next lint` -> 'No ESLint warnings or errors'. tsc: `npx tsc --noEmit` -> exit 0. test:unit (target file): 42 passed | 1 skipped. build: not re-run here; orchestrator/TDD context confirms changes are className-only with no logic/props/API changes, so build risk is nil (build was already confirmed passing by the orchestrator).

criteria_results.criterion: PC版1920pxでFilePanelがviewport内 / file-panel-pane.right<=innerWidth / desktop-layout幅がviewport内 / History表示切替・ActivityPane幅変更でも成立
criteria_results.evidence: These are width-based assertions (getBoundingClientRect().right <= window.innerWidth, desktop-layout width within viewport, behavior across History toggle and ActivityPane resize). jsdom does not compute layout and returns width 0, so they cannot be verified by unit/integration tests. They require Playwright e2e at a 1920px viewport with a real layout engine. Out of scope for automated unit verification in this iteration.

e2e_required_criteria: PC版1920pxでファイル選択時にFilePanelがviewport内に収まる
desktop-layout 要素の幅が viewport 内に収まる
History 表示切替後も横溢れしない
ActivityPane 幅変更後も横溢れしない
summary: CSS-only fix verified by static + unit means. git diff confirms `min-w-0` was added to exactly the two desktop flex containers (L1740 PRIMARY, L1763 DEFENSIVE) wrapping WorktreeDesktopLayout, while the mobile `flex-1 min-h-0` at L1590 is untouched and absent from the diff. The new Issue #732 unit test passes (asserts toHaveClass min-w-0 on both containers via DOM traversal from the desktop-layout testid) with no regressions in the file (42 passed | 1 skipped). Quality gates pass: ESLint clean, tsc --noEmit exit 0, target unit tests green; build was already confirmed passing by the orchestrator and changes are className-only. The width-based acceptance criteria (FilePanel/right<=innerWidth, desktop-layout width, History toggle, ActivityPane resize) are e2e-only because jsdom returns 0 width, and are documented as Playwright-required and out of scope for automated unit verification here.
